tasks.title: Create Logging Crate Structure
tasks.description: Create the foundational logging crate with directory structure, Cargo.toml dependencies, and module declarations for the opencode-logging package.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify crate builds successfully with cargo build -p opencode-logging
AddUnitTest: verify no compiler warnings in release build
AddUnitTest: verify all module exports are accessible from lib.rs
AddRegressionTest: ensure workspace Cargo.toml includes the new crate
tasks.impl_notes: Create directory structure crates/logging/src/ and crates/logging/tests/. Cargo.toml should include: tracing, chrono, serde, serde_json, thiserror, tokio. Add crate to workspace Cargo.toml.

tasks.title: Implement LogLevel Enum with TRACE
tasks.description: Create LogLevel enum with variants: Trace, Debug, Info, Warn, Error. Implement From<LogLevel> for tracing::Level conversion. Add serde Serialize/Deserialize support.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify LogLevel::Trace converts to tracing::Level::TRACE
AddUnitTest: verify all level variants serialize to lowercase string
AddUnitTest: verify deserialization works for all variants
AddUnitTest: verify level ordering (Trace < Debug < Info < Warn < Error)
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_level
tasks.impl_notes: LogLevel ordering must match severity: Trace=0, Debug=1, Info=2, Warn=3, Error=4. Implement ordinal() method for comparisons.

tasks.title: Implement LogFields Struct
tasks.description: Create LogFields struct with all optional fields: session_id, tool_name, latency_ms, model, provider, token_count, error_code, file_path, line, extra. Implement Default and serde support.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify LogFields::default() creates empty struct with no fields set
AddUnitTest: verify serialization includes all fields when set
AddUnitTest: verify deserialization populates correct fields
AddUnitTest: verify extra HashMap can store arbitrary JSON values
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_fields
tasks.impl_notes: All fields are Option<T>. extra is a HashMap<String, serde_json::Value> for extensibility.

tasks.title: Implement LogEvent Struct
tasks.description: Create LogEvent with seq (atomic u64), timestamp (DateTime<Utc>), level, target, message, fields, span_id, parent_seq. Add constructor and sequence number generation.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify sequence numbers are unique and incrementing
AddUnitTest: verify timestamp is high-precision UTC
AddUnitTest: verify LogEvent::new() constructor works
AddUnitTest: verify serialization includes all fields
AddUnitTest: verify parent_seq can link events in chains
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_event
tasks.impl_notes: Use std::sync::atomic::AtomicU64 for sequence generation. seq starts at 1. span_id format should be trace_id:span_id.

tasks.title: Implement LogQuery Struct
tasks.description: Create LogQuery with session_id, level, target, since, until, limit. Implement matches() method, Default, and helper methods for_session() and for_level().
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify LogQuery::matches returns true when event matches all set criteria
AddUnitTest: verify LogQuery::matches returns false when event fails any criterion
AddUnitTest: verify LogQuery::for_session creates query for specific session
AddUnitTest: verify LogQuery::for_level creates query for specific level
AddUnitTest: verify empty query matches all events
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_query
tasks.impl_notes: matches() should return true only if ALL set fields match. None fields should be ignored (wildcard).

tasks.title: Implement SessionLogBuffer (Ring Buffer)
tasks.description: Create SessionLogBuffer with fixed capacity. Implement O(1) push with oldest eviction, get_range, get_by_level, len, is_empty. Add tests for ring buffer behavior.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify O(1) insertion performance for push()
AddUnitTest: verify oldest event evicted when capacity exceeded
AddUnitTest: verify get_range returns correct sequence range
AddUnitTest: verify get_by_level filters correctly
AddUnitTest: verify len() and is_empty() return correct values
AddUnitTest: verify wraparound behavior at capacity boundary
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging session_log_buffer
tasks.impl_notes: Use VecDeque for O(1) push/pop. Capacity should be configurable via constructor. Eviction must be deterministic.

tasks.title: Implement LogStore (SQLite Persistence)
tasks.description: Create LogStore with SQLite Connection. Implement new(), schema creation, append(), query(), recent(), prune(). Handle database errors gracefully.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify new() creates database and schema
AddUnitTest: verify append() inserts LogEvent correctly
AddUnitTest: verify query() returns filtered results
AddUnitTest: verify recent() returns session's latest logs
AddUnitTest: verify prune() removes old logs and returns count
AddUnitTest: verify index improves query performance
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_store
tasks.impl_notes: Schema: logs(seq, timestamp, level, target, message, fields_json, span_id, parent_seq, session_id). Index on (session_id, timestamp). Use rusqlite.

tasks.title: Implement AgentLogger Trait
tasks.description: Define AgentLogger trait with trace/debug/info/warn/error methods, with_context() returning ChildLogger, and async query(). Implement AgentLoggerImpl.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify all log levels emit correctly
AddUnitTest: verify ChildLogger context chaining works
AddUnitTest: verify with_context() creates child with merged fields
AddUnitTest: verify query() returns matching events
AddUnitTest: verify trait objects work across implementations
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging agent_logger
tasks.impl_notes: AgentLogger should be async trait. ChildLogger wraps parent fields + additional context. Implement Debug for testing.

tasks.title: Implement LoggingConfig
tasks.description: Create LoggingConfig struct with level, targets, file_path, max_file_size_mb, max_rotated_files, show_in_tui, tui_position, memory_buffer_size, retention_days. Implement Default and TOML deserialization.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Default provides sensible values
AddUnitTest: verify TOML deserialization parses all fields
AddUnitTest: verify TuiLogPosition enum variants (Bottom, Right, Overlay)
AddUnitTest: verify targets HashMap allows per-component levels
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging logging_config
tasks.impl_notes: max_file_size_mb default 50, max_rotated_files default 5, memory_buffer_size default 10000, retention_days default 30.

tasks.title: Implement SanitizedValue for Secret Redaction
tasks.description: Create SanitizedValue enum (Safe, Redacted, Nested) and Sanitizer struct. Implement redaction for api_key, password, token, secret, authorization, *_key, *_token, *_secret patterns.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify api_key exact match redacted
AddUnitTest: verify password exact match redacted
AddUnitTest: verify token exact match redacted
AddUnitTest: verify authorization exact match redacted
AddUnitTest: verify *_key suffix pattern redacted
AddUnitTest: verify *_token suffix pattern redacted
AddUnitTest: verify *_secret suffix pattern redacted
AddUnitTest: verify nested structures handled correctly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging sanitizer
tasks.impl_notes: Redacted value should be [REDACTED]. Nested should recursively sanitize HashMap values. Case-insensitive matching.

tasks.title: Implement log_tool! Macro
tasks.description: Implement log_tool! macro that expands to logger.info with target 'tool.{name}', formatted message, and field construction. Support field syntax like latency_ms = 45.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify macro expands to correct info! call
AddUnitTest: verify field syntax parses correctly
AddUnitTest: verify target format is tool.{tool_name}
AddUnitTest: verify message format is Tool {status} completed
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_tool_macro
tasks.impl_notes: Macro signature: log_tool!($logger, $tool, $status, $($field:tt)*). Should call log_fields! internally.

tasks.title: Implement log_llm! Macro
tasks.description: Implement log_llm! macro that expands to logger.info with target 'llm.$provider', setting provider, model, token_count, latency_ms fields.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify macro expands to correct logger.info call
AddUnitTest: verify target format is llm.{provider}
AddUnitTest: verify all LLM fields populated correctly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_llm_macro
tasks.impl_notes: Macro signature: log_llm!($logger, $provider, $model, $tokens, $latency, $status).

tasks.title: Implement log_fields! Macro
tasks.description: Implement log_fields! macro with two forms: field-only (log_fields!(session_id, tool_name)) and key-value (log_fields!(latency_ms = 45)). Support expressions not just literals.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify field-only form compiles and returns LogFields
AddUnitTest: verify key-value form parses and sets values
AddUnitTest: verify expression evaluation works (not just literals)
AddUnitTest: verify all LogFields optional fields supported
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_fields_macro
tasks.impl_notes: Field-only sets field to Some(field_name.to_string()). Key-value sets to Some(value).

tasks.title: Implement ReasoningLog and ToolConsideration
tasks.description: Create ToolConsideration struct (tool_name, reason, selected) and ReasoningLog struct (step_id, session_id, timestamp, prompt, response, tools_considered, decision, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, latency_ms).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ToolConsideration serialization works
AddUnitTest: verify ReasoningLog with tools_considered serializes correctly
AddUnitTest: verify deserialization preserves all fields
AddUnitTest: verify token counts and latency captured correctly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging reasoning_log
tasks.impl_notes: decision field captures why this tool was chosen over others. tools_considered is Vec for multi-option reasoning.

tasks.title: Implement ToolExecutionLog
tasks.description: Create ToolExecutionLog struct (execution_id, session_id, tool_name, timestamp, parameters: SanitizedValue, result, latency_ms, error). Use SanitizedValue for parameter sanitization.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ToolExecutionLog serializes correctly
AddUnitTest: verify parameters use SanitizedValue type
AddUnitTest: verify result field captures tool output
AddUnitTest: verify error field is Option<ErrorContext>
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging tool_execution_log
tasks.impl_notes: result should be ToolResult from opencode-core. execution_id format: {session_id}:{tool_name}:{timestamp_ns}.

tasks.title: Implement ErrorContext, ErrorFrame, CauseInfo
tasks.description: Create ErrorFrame (file, line, function), CauseInfo (code, message), ErrorContext (code, message, stack: Vec<ErrorFrame>, cause_chain: Vec<CauseInfo>, context).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ErrorFrame captures file path and line number
AddUnitTest: verify ErrorContext stack captures full trace
AddUnitTest: verify cause_chain links error causes
AddUnitTest: verify context HashMap stores additional info
AddUnitTest: verify serialization preserves all fields
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging error_context
tasks.impl_notes: stack should capture at capture point, not at display. cause_chain is ordered from root cause to immediate cause.

tasks.title: Implement TUI Log Panel
tasks.description: Create LogPanel widget for ratatui with header (session, log count, buttons), log list, scroll navigation, level filter, component filter, text search, expandable error details.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify LogPanel renders with correct layout
AddUnitTest: verify empty state shows placeholder message
AddUnitTest: verify filter buttons toggle correctly
AddUnitTest: verify arrow key scroll navigation works
AddUnitTest: verify Ctrl+L toggles visibility
AddUnitTest: verify text search filters logs
AddUnitTest: verify error details expand on click
AddUnitTest: verify auto-scroll toggle behavior
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --features tui log_panel
tasks.impl_notes: Use ratatui Widget trait. Layout: header row, separator, scrollable log list. Level buttons: INFO DEBUG WARN ERROR. Component filter dropdown.

tasks.title: Implement Per-Component Log Level Filtering
tasks.description: Implement glob-based target matching (exact, prefix*, *suffix). Filter resolution order: exact match, glob match, fallback to global level.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify exact match 'agent' -> agent
AddUnitTest: verify prefix wildcard 'llm.*' matches 'llm.openai'
AddUnitTest: verify suffix wildcard '*.read' matches 'tool.read'
AddUnitTest: verify priority resolution order is correct
AddUnitTest: verify fallback to global level works
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging per_component_filter
tasks.impl_notes: Wildcard glob pattern matching. Check exact first, then prefix glob, then suffix glob. Default to global if no match.

tasks.title: Implement Size-Based Log Rotation
tasks.description: Implement file size check before write. Rotate: opencode.log -> opencode.log.1 -> opencode.log.2. Delete oldest when max_rotated_files exceeded.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify rotation triggered at max_file_size_mb
AddUnitTest: verify rotated file numbering increments correctly
AddUnitTest: verify oldest file deleted when max_rotated_files exceeded
AddUnitTest: verify new log file created after rotation
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging log_rotation
tasks.impl_notes: Check file size before each write. When rotating: rename existing to .1, .1 to .2, etc. Delete file.n+1 where n=max_rotated_files.

tasks.title: Implement Log Query Tool for Agent Self-Diagnosis
tasks.description: Create LogQueryTool struct implementing Tool trait. Define schema with session_id, level, target, since, until, limit. Return structured log events matching query.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify tool schema defines all query parameters
AddUnitTest: verify execute returns matching LogEvents
AddUnitTest: verify ISO 8601 date parsing works for since/until
AddUnitTest: verify results are structured JSON
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-tools log_query_tool
tasks.impl_notes: Tool should be registered in crates/tools/src/lib.rs. Return format: {events: [...], count: N}. Use opencode-core Tool trait.

tasks.title: Logger Tests
tasks.description: Test LogEvent serialization, level filtering, query matching, ChildLogger context chaining in crates/logging/tests/logger_tests.rs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify LogEvent round-trip serialization
AddUnitTest: verify level filtering excludes non-matching levels
AddUnitTest: verify query matching for all field combinations
AddUnitTest: verify ChildLogger inherits and extends parent context
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --test logger_tests
tasks.impl_notes: Use tempfile for test database. Test concurrent access to LogStore.

tasks.title: Sanitizer Tests
tasks.description: Test all sanitizer patterns in crates/logging/tests/sanitizer_tests.rs: api_key, password, token, *_key, *_token, *_secret, authorization, nested structures.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify api_key exact match redacted
AddUnitTest: verify password exact match redacted
AddUnitTest: verify token exact match redacted
AddUnitTest: verify authorization exact match redacted
AddUnitTest: verify *_key suffix pattern redacted
AddUnitTest: verify *_token suffix pattern redacted
AddUnitTest: verify *_secret suffix pattern redacted
AddUnitTest: verify nested HashMap values sanitized recursively
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --test sanitizer_tests
tasks.impl_notes: Test edge cases: empty string, partial matches, case sensitivity.

tasks.title: Query Tests
tasks.description: Test query by session_id, level, target, time range, combined queries, limit parameter in crates/logging/tests/query_tests.rs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify query by session_id returns only that session's logs
AddUnitTest: verify query by level returns only matching severity
AddUnitTest: verify query by target returns matching components
AddUnitTest: verify query by time range filters correctly
AddUnitTest: verify combined queries match all criteria
AddUnitTest: verify limit parameter caps result count
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --test query_tests
tasks.impl_notes: Test boundary conditions: since == until, limit = 0, limit > results.

tasks.title: TUI Tests
tasks.description: Test log panel rendering, empty state, filter behavior, scroll behavior in crates/logging/tests/tui_tests.rs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify log panel renders with border
AddUnitTest: verify empty state shows visible placeholder
AddUnitTest: verify level filter buttons work
AddUnitTest: verify component filter dropdown works
AddUnitTest: verify scroll up/down behavior
AddUnitTest: verify auto-scroll toggle
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --test tui_tests --features tui
tasks.impl_notes: Use ratatui TestBackend for rendering tests. Test Ctrl+L keybinding.

tasks.title: Log Store Query by Session
tasks.description: Integration test: insert logs with different session_ids, query by session_id, verify only matching logs returned.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: insert 10 logs with session_a and 5 logs with session_b
AddIntegrationTest: query by session_a returns exactly 10 logs
AddIntegrationTest: query by session_b returns exactly 5 logs
AddIntegrationTest: query without session_id returns all logs
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --test integration_tests
tasks.impl_notes: Use temporary database for isolation. Clean up after test.

tasks.title: Log Rotation
tasks.description: Integration test: configure small max_file_size_mb, write logs until rotation triggered, verify rotated files created, verify oldest deleted.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: configure max_file_size_mb = 1
AddIntegrationTest: write 100 logs of ~2KB each
AddIntegrationTest: verify rotation occurs and creates opencode.log.1
AddIntegrationTest: verify opencode.log.2 created after more writes
AddIntegrationTest: verify oldest file deleted when max_rotated_files exceeded
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --test integration_tests log_rotation
tasks.impl_notes: Clean up test files after each run. Use unique temp directory per test.

tasks.title: Reasoning Log Persistence
tasks.description: Integration test: create ReasoningLog entry, store in LogStore, query and retrieve, verify all fields preserved including tools_considered.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: create ReasoningLog with 3 tool considerations
AddIntegrationTest: store in LogStore
AddIntegrationTest: query returns the ReasoningLog
AddIntegrationTest: verify tools_considered preserved with selected flags
AddIntegrationTest: verify prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, latency_ms correct
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --test integration_tests reasoning_persistence
tasks.impl_notes: ReasoningLog may need separate table or stored as JSON in logs table.

tasks.title: Tool Execution Sanitization
tasks.description: Integration test: execute tool with parameters containing secrets (api_key, password), verify parameters sanitized in ToolExecutionLog, verify secret values redacted.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: create tool parameters with {api_key: secret123, password: pass456}
AddIntegrationTest: execute via AgentLogger
AddIntegrationTest: query ToolExecutionLog from LogStore
AddIntegrationTest: verify parameters show [REDACTED] for api_key and password
AddIntegrationTest: verify non-secret fields show actual values
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-logging --test integration_tests tool_sanitization
tasks.impl_notes: Sanitizer must be applied before LogStore::append().
